title: Drag and Drop
excerpt: How do i drag a date down to all cells in the column? Or is there a button I can press?

posts.author: gabrielledagosta (Gabrielle)
posts.cookedHtml: How do i drag a date down to all cells in the column? Or is there a button I can press?

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: If you select more than one row at a time. ie You can select the first one, click shift and then click the last one that you want to select and it will select all of them. Then just change the date on one of them, will change all of them.
